caption: goodbye, chandigarh
body: two years of punjabi, parathas, and winters i wasn't ready for. leaving doesn't feel like an ending.

caption: signed off
body: two years of building across the stack. grateful for the team, the late nights, and everyone who made it worth showing up.

caption: year-end in the hills
body: end of the year, end of a long stretch of building. himachal gave us cold mornings and easy laughter. kind of trip that sticks because of who you went with.

caption: fresh air
body: hadn't really left the office rhythm in a while. uttarakhand was the exhale i didn't know i needed.

caption: friends for life
body: mist on the hills, coffee that tasted better because of who was across the table. the kind of friendships where you just pick up and keep going.

caption: hello punjab
body: new year, new state, new everything. didn't know a word of punjabi yet — but the food, the people, the pace of it all made the move feel right.

caption: capital city
body: a few stolen hours between everything else. walked until my feet hurt. not enough time, but enough to know i'll be back.

caption: top of the country
body: snow on the edges, mountains that made everything below feel far away. the kind of quiet you only get above a certain altitude.
